description: Update spec/plan when implementation reveals issues

preconditions.requirement: Every project-scoped packet call includes root
If a required packet returns ok:false, halt and report the packet error

packetFlow.instruction: Resolve the project root with `cadre_project` using `action: "root"`.

Call `cadre_workflow` with `workflow: "revise"`, the requested `trackId`, revision `reason`, and proposed structured `spec` or `plan` JSON fields. If reason or spec/plan scope is unclear, the packet returns `phase_state:"awaiting_clarification"` with `intent_prompts`; load `native-prompts`, ask those questions, and do not invent revised requirements.
Use the returned track context, impact analysis, revision reason, and review_bundle manifest/path list to review proposed canonical JSON changes and generated Markdown projection previews.

When packet-supported mutation is requested, call the workflow packet again with `execute: true` and `approvalComplete: true` after reviewing the review_bundle manifest/path list without inlining large artifacts into model context.
Summarize changed requirements, affected tasks, tests to update, changed canonical JSON artifacts, generated human projections, and packet warnings.

forbiddenActions: Do not recreate Cadre control-plane, native event/message state, index, worktree, provider, merge, or cleanup state with shell commands
Do not read or write Markdown projections as canonical state
Do not use Markdown payload fields, legacy Markdown import, or prompt-side state repair
